svg.title: Sync Architecture: End-to-End Component & Data Flow
svg.desc: Accurate end-to-end generic sync pipeline featuring offline-first local stores, transactional outbox, composite cursor pull, config-driven conflict resolution, and strict integrity gating.
svg.text: Sync Architecture: End-to-End Component & Data Flow
Complete offline-first engine with exact phases: transactional outbox push, cursor-based pagination pull, integrity gating, and conflict resolution.
